name: RCSG Framework Ontology (Regulatory, Compliance, Security & Governance)
description: Unified RCSG framework ontology combining abstract regulatory, compliance, security and governance context with the NCSC/DSIT Cyber Governance Code of Practice. 9 entities covering RCSG context profiles, regulatory requirements, compliance frameworks, governance models, governance codes, principles, board-level actions, glossary terms, and cross-framework mappings to 9 international standards.

components.RCSGContext: Top-level RCSG profile with compliance posture, primary regulator, data classification
components.RegulatoryRequirement: Specific regulation with enforcement body, jurisdiction, penalty risk
components.ComplianceFramework: Framework certification (ISO27001, SOC2, PCI-DSS, MCSB) with scope and expiry
components.GovernanceModel: Board, committee, policy structures — central governance node connecting to governance codes
components.GovernanceCode: Published governance code, standard, or guide with principles and board-level actions
components.GovernancePrinciple: High-level governance principle within a code (e.g. Risk Management, Strategy, People)
components.GovernanceAction: Specific board-level governance action with dependency chains and cross-framework mappings
components.GovernanceGlossaryTerm: Defined term from a governance code glossary
components.GovernanceActionMapping: Cross-framework mapping linking governance actions to external standard controls

crossOntology.name: rcsgDrivesFunctionalMaturity
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> CTX: RCSG drives Legal/Compliance maturity

crossOntology.name: regulatoryInMarket
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> CTX: Regulations apply to market verticals

crossOntology.name: complianceRequiresITMaturity
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> CTX: Compliance requires IT maturity

crossOntology.name: regulatoryImplementedByGDPR
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> GDPR: Regulatory implementation via GDPR principles

crossOntology.name: governanceAlignedToCAF
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> NCSC-CAF: Governance action aligns to CAF principle

crossOntology.name: governanceAlignedToCAFOutcome
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> NCSC-CAF: Governance action aligns to CAF contributing outcome

crossOntology.name: publishedByAuthority
crossOntology.purpose: RCSG-FW -> ORG: Governance code published by domain authority

versionHistory.changes: Major: merged CG-ONT into RCSG-FW. 9 entities (4 original + 5 governance code entities), 24 relationships (14 internal + 10 cross-ontology), 10 business rules, 4 enumerations. New hasGovernanceCode relationship connecting GovernanceModel to governance code hierarchy. Seed instances: 1 code, 5 principles, 22 actions, 12 glossary terms. 150 cross-framework mapping instances across 9 international standards. Epic 30 F30.11.

Initial release: 4 entities, 10 relationships (3 internal + 7 cross-ontology), 4 business rules. Extracted from CTX ontology to establish abstract RCSG framework layer with formalized bridges to GDPR-ONT, PII-ONT, MCSB-ONT.

notes: Unified RCSG framework hub combining abstract RCSG context layer with NCSC/DSIT Cyber Governance Code of Practice. GovernanceModel serves as central governance node connecting to published governance codes, principles, and board-level actions. Cross-framework mappings to 9 international standards (NCSC CAF, COBIT, NIST CSF, ISO 27001, CMMI, IASME, ISA, ANSSI, WEF).

oaa:joinPatterns.name: RCSG Framework to CTX Jurisdiction Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Links regulatory requirements to geographic context for jurisdiction-specific compliance
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Determine which regulations apply based on organisational operating regions

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Governance Model to Code Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Links the central governance model to published governance codes for board-level oversight
oaa:joinPatterns.joinPath: rcsg-fw:GovernanceModel → rcsg-fw:hasGovernanceCode → rcsg-fw:GovernanceCode → rcsg-fw:hasPrinciple → rcsg-fw:GovernancePrinciple → rcsg-fw:hasAction → rcsg-fw:GovernanceAction
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Navigate from governance model through code hierarchy to specific board actions

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Governance Action to CAF Alignment Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Links governance actions to NCSC CAF principles for cross-framework compliance alignment
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Map governance board actions to operational CAF assessment outcomes

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Governance Code to Authority Bridge
oaa:joinPatterns.description: Links governance codes to their publishing domain authority organization
oaa:joinPatterns.useCase: Identify which domain authorities publish governance codes and their jurisdictional scope
